name: career-helper
description: End-to-end career support for job seekers - LinkedIn optimization, ATS CV rewriting, interview preparation, interviewer's perspective reports, post-interview coaching, company research, hiring manager identification, and networking strategy
author: Paul Bratcher
notes: Comprehensive job search assistant with human-in-the-loop guidance. v0.3.0 adds Post-Interview Coaching capability with rejection diagnosis (skill/signal/fit gaps), WEF 2025 future skills alignment, wellbeing support, and LinkedIn AI optimization guidance.
